hard_fail_conditions: any of {i, psi, Hilbert space H, Born rule p=|psi|^2, tensor product (x), canonical commutator [A,B]=i*hbar, spin, particle, creation/annihilation operator, vacuum state, coupling constant} used as a PREMISE (not merely named as a destination/target under an OPEN or yellow node) anywhere in the active files -- see prohibited_active_domain_tokens below

oscillation (the Q-OS1 spine-dispersion split) labeled or claimed AS quantum, or the word 'quantum' applied to any node before state + norm + composition + channel + measurement close TOGETHER -- 'oscillation is NOT yet quantum' is the founder's core discipline for this domain and may never be blurred

any gate in RULE_REGISTRY.json -> gates claimed status:green or status:closed WITHOUT both a passing_control and a failing_control present and machine-derived (Type-U convention) -- QG-11..QG-14 in particular must stay yellow/red with their 'NOT YET CONSTRUCTED' controls stated honestly, never silently upgraded

citing InfoQuantumRelativityUnification.v or InfoSeedFeedsQuantumRelativity_attempt.v as a root-native derivation of quantum mechanics or of 'QM and SR from one root' -- they are YELLOW_BRIDGE_PARTIAL bounded algebraic identities ONLY (Q-Y1), because box_quad inherits the imported Minkowski signature from InfoLorentzInvariance.box_quad
citing InfoLorentzInvariance.v, InfoAnalysisLift.v, or InfoQuantumGravityRootBridge_attempt.v as root-native (all REFUSED -- see PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md)
any RED (OPEN) node in ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md / CLOSURE_AUDIT.json claimed closed, upgraded to yellow or green, or claimed to have a passing witness that does not exist in quantum_closure_v0_1.py
Q-S1..S3's seed-torsion/SkewOff branch asserted to BE spin, angular momentum, or any named quantum-mechanical operator (Q-X11 stays fully OPEN)
Q-M1/Q-Y5's memory-before-mass readout asserted to be real physical mass, inertia, or E=mc^2
Q-G1's discrete curvature chain asserted to be a quantum-gravity coupling constant or a physical spacetime metric
a claim stronger than the declared tier QUANTUM_ROOT_CLOSURE_PARTIAL (see CLAIM_BOUNDARY.json)
the 32-node denominator in CLOSURE_AUDIT.json presented as coverage of 'all of quantum mechanics' or 'all textbook QM' rather than of this specific Minimal Quantum DAG
the strict/weighted percentages (43.75% / 53.1%) recomputed by moving Born, measurement, spin, composition, or QFT out of red without a new machine-derived witness with both controls
missing verifier (quantum_closure_v0_1.py), source_root snapshot, CLAIM_BOUNDARY.json, RULE_REGISTRY.json, ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md, CLOSURE_AUDIT.json, or run_tests.py

quantum_closure_v0_1.py modified from its shipped exact-rational form (e.g. floats introduced, checks removed, network calls added) -- it is the immutable v0.1 anchor and must keep returning DECISION: PASS unmodified
unregistered active rule (a claim or equation appearing in code/docs with no corresponding rule_id in RULE_REGISTRY.json)
network or third-party runtime dependency introduced anywhere in the verification path

Q-C1's single closed-pair complexification witness generalized in prose to 'a general complex Hilbert space has been constructed' without the corresponding Q-X1 (red, OPEN) caveat attached in the same breath
QG-10's single-refinement Born-candidate evidence (p=2 vs p=1) presented as Born-rule uniqueness rather than finite-diagnostic evidence for a target
note_on_tokens: These names may appear in prose ONLY as explicit comparisons/disclaimers (e.g. 'this is not the Schrodinger equation') or as the label of a still-RED/OPEN destination node (e.g. Q-X6 'measurement/Born-rule uniqueness (OPEN)'). They fail the contract if activated as an imported PREMISE that any derivation or witness in quantum_closure_v0_1.py or RULE_REGISTRY.json depends on.
